stackRefinements.core: Node ESM shared library with zod schemas
stackRefinements.test-kit: Shared test utilities built on vitest (dev-only consumer-facing)
stackRefinements.legacy: CommonJS bundle (module.exports) with no manifest; stack cannot be confirmed from dependencies

ordering.signal: core is the sole runtime provider, consumed by both svc and web; when a task spans layers, change core first, then svc and web in either order. test-kit is consumed only as a devDependency of svc, so it carries little ordering weight. legacy participates in no internal edges.

gaps: legacy (packages/legacy) has no recognizable manifest (no package.json); internal and external dependencies for this layer cannot be mapped.
web links @edge/core via file:../core instead of the workspace: protocol used elsewhere; edge still recorded, but the inconsistent linkage convention is worth confirming with the team.
legacy/src/index.js uses CommonJS (module.exports) while the repo root declares type: module; module-system mismatch noted for the profile.
